amount.description: Transfer amount in cents ($100 would be 10000)

bank_message.description: Instructions intended for the financial institutions that are processing the wire.

customer_id.description: The customer UUID representing the person initiating the Wire transfer

metadata.description: Additional transfer metadata structured as key-value pairs

receiving_account_id.description: The external account uuid representing the recipient of the wire.

recipient_message.description: Information from the originator to the beneficiary (recipient).
